title: Howmet Aerospace Inc. Form 10-K for FY2024

title: Howmet Aerospace Q1 2025 earnings call transcript (John Plant / Ken Giacobbe)
used_for: Spares ~20% of revenue, +33% overall; aero/defense spares +40%; defense aero +19% (F-35 spares); LEAP/LPT destocking to clear by Q3/Q4 as production rises (~450+ LEAP/qtr); guide raised on spares + Boeing 737 rate; incremental EBITDA flow-through >100%; net debt/EBITDA record-low 1.4x, targeting ~1.1x by YE; Fitch upgrade to BBB+ (3 notches into IG); tariff net <$15M after mitigation; $2.0B buyback authorization remaining; Wheels EBITDA margin 27%
